classification_rules: Native-Elisa: implemented in Elisa and expected to carry behavior (legacy Implemented entries map here).
Stub-Parity: intentionally shallow parity surface; behavior is placeholder-compatible but not complete.
External-C-ABI: legitimate external/native ABI boundary (non-project behavior owned outside Elisa).
Temporary-Cpp-Bridge: project-owned C++ bridge that must include blocker, retirement plan, and retirement notes.
AeroLibFallback: import is currently satisfied by generic AeroLib fallback stubs.
Missing: required symbol or unit has no acceptable implementation path yet.

libraries.name: NGS2
libraries.notes: Ported with stub-parity and handle/argument contract parity for major lifecycle APIs.

libraries.name: Random
libraries.notes: Ported with exact parity for current C++ size validation and random byte fill behavior.

libraries.name: RazorCpu
libraries.notes: Ported with exact stub-parity for the current C++ surface.

libraries.name: Rtc
libraries.notes: Ported with full exported surface and behavioral parity for current rtc.cpp date, tick, parser, formatter, and timezone contracts.

libraries.name: Videodec
libraries.notes: Default core_port/core_port_noipc runtime now includes videodec_native.elisa. The native bridge links videodec_elisa_bridge.cc plus shadPS4 videodec_impl.cpp/videodec2_impl.cpp and FFmpeg, so create/decode/flush/reset delegate to the C++ decoder implementation for functional frame payload parity. videodec.elisa remains a pure fallback/test surface.

libraries.name: ShaderRecompiler-SPIRV
libraries.notes: Full SPIR-V backend parity is currently enforced through a temporary approved C ABI bridge to the canonical C++ emitter while native Elisa emission coverage expands.
